full_text:
Ma Wan 馬玩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Wan (馬玩). Served under Han Sui. Tried to protect Han Sui from Ma Chao, but failed. Ma Wan was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty.
